description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 11th; Slot none; Price 49,800 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION Created from a number of iron rods, copper gears, and silver screws, this staff constantly shifts and changes. The staff allows use of the following spells: Make whole (1 charge) Mending (1 charge) Animate objects (2 charges) In addition, once per day, the staff can become a Medium animated object with the metal special ability. It can remain in this form for up to 10 minutes. If destroyed while in this form, it reverts to being a staff, but it loses all of its charges and this ability cannot be used again until it is fully recharged. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells animate objects, make whole, mending; Cost 24,900 gp.
